requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — COSQC and MoEL Requirements for Iraq
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——伊拉克COSQC及电力部要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——伊拉克COSQC及電力部要求

summary.en: Iraq's Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control (COSQC) issues IQS (Iraqi Quality Standards) and aligns with international IEC standards. EV chargers imported into Iraq require COSQC conformity assessment and pre-shipment inspection coordination. IEC 61851-1 is the applicable baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions. IEC 61851-23:2023 applies to DC EV charging stations. Given Iraq's extreme summer ambient temperatures (regularly exceeding 45–50 °C), IP-rated enclosure protection is critical: IP65 is appropriate for outdoor AC chargers and IP54 for DC chargers, with IK10 mechanical impact protection recommended. COSQC pre-shipment inspection and MoEL coordination must both be addressed before deployment.
summary.zh: 伊拉克标准与质量控制中央机构（COSQC）发布IQS（伊拉克质量标准），并与IEC国际标准接轨。进口至伊拉克的电动汽车充电桩须进行COSQC合格评定和装运前检验协调。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的适用基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车充电站。鉴于伊拉克夏季极端环境温度（常超45至50°C），IP防护等级至关重要：室外交流充电桩建议IP65，直流充电桩建议IP54，并推荐IK10机械冲击防护。部署前须同时完成COSQC装运前检验和MoEL协调。
summary.zht: 伊拉克標準與質量控制中央機構（COSQC）發布IQS（伊拉克質量標準），並與IEC國際標準接軌。進口至伊拉克的電動汽車充電樁須進行COSQC合格評定和裝運前檢驗協調。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的適用基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車充電站。鑑於伊拉克夏季極端環境溫度（常超45至50°C），IP防護等級至關重要：室外交流充電樁建議IP65，直流充電樁建議IP54，並推薦IK10機械衝擊防護。部署前須同時完成COSQC裝運前檢驗和MoEL協調。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 for outdoor AC, IP54 for DC, IK10 mechanical impact
COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control) — conformity assessment and pre-shipment inspection

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required by COSQC conformity assessment or MoEL project acceptance in Iraq.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代伊拉克COSQC合格评定或MoEL项目验收所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代伊拉克COSQC合格評定或MoEL項目驗收所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP65 / IP54 / IK10 test certificates, protective device ratings, thermal derating evidence for Iraq's extreme ambient temperatures (regularly exceeding 45–50 °C), surge protection evidence for Iraq's unstable grid, COSQC pre-shipment inspection documentation, and installation instructions aligned with MoEL or project requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、IP65 / IP54 / IK10测试证书、保护器件额定值、适配伊拉克极端环境温度（常超45至50°C）的热降额证据、适应伊拉克不稳定电网的浪涌保护证据、COSQC装运前检验文件，以及符合MoEL或项目要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、IP65 / IP54 / IK10測試證書、保護器件額定值、適配伊拉克極端環境溫度（常超45至50°C）的熱降額證據、適應伊拉克不穩定電網的浪涌保護證據、COSQC裝運前檢驗文件，以及符合MoEL或項目要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — COSQC conformity assessment and pre-shipment inspection required for electrical equipment imports to Iraq; IEC 61851 is the applicable safety framework; IP65 / IP54 / IK10 enclosure protection required for Iraq environment; confirm exact COSQC route and MoEL requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Iraq without additional accredited testing

source.publisher: COSQC — Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control (Iraq)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Iraq-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, surge protection evidence, thermal review for Iraq's extreme ambient conditions, and COSQC pre-shipment inspection documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向伊拉克的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级认证书、浪涌保护证据、针对伊拉克极端环境的热环境审查，以及COSQC装运前检验文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向伊拉克的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級認證書、浪涌保護證據、針對伊拉克極端環境的熱環境審查，以及COSQC裝運前檢驗文件。
